description: Address v2 review findings: guard against unknown kid in JWKS lookup and broaden retry condition to cover signing key not found errors
steps: In src/lambda/rest-api.jwt-authorizer.ts, in the promisedVerify signing key callback, add a guard before accessing keys[header.kid!].pem to handle unknown kid gracefully
In the handler catch block, broaden the retry condition to also trigger on 'signing key not found' errors in addition to 'invalid signature'
acceptance_criteria: Unknown kid no longer crashes with TypeError; instead returns a clean error 'signing key not found for kid'
Retry logic triggers on both 'invalid signature' and 'signing key not found' error messages
